blocks.text: had not moved during the argument. Mara had noticed.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: About whatever is happening in your head right now.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You've gone quiet. Your specific kind of quiet.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You have at least four. This is the one where you're building something.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Two voices. One argument. Nobody went up to check. They all looked away.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: We know someone didn't come back downstairs.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Get some sleep. It was a long day.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Don't stay on that porch all night.

options.label: She goes in. She trusts him.
She stays. She sits beside him without saying anything.
